message:
test(conformance): HPKE + session message golden vectors, capability/holder proof fixes

New golden vector modules:
- hpke.rs (382 lines): HPKE encryption/decryption golden vectors with
  deterministic key derivation and ciphertext verification
- session_messages.rs (491 lines): session handshake message golden vectors
  covering connect, challenge, verify, and established transitions

Fixes to existing vectors:
- capability.rs: fix golden vector field alignment for updated schema
- holder_proof.rs: fix signable-bytes derivation for updated proof format

Conformance Cargo.toml: add fcp-async-core + blake3 dependencies for
deterministic vector generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,8 @@ uuid.workspace = true
 jsonschema.workspace = true
 clap = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
 ciborium.workspace = true
+rand.workspace = true
+rand_chacha = "0.3"
 
 # FCP crates (for types and encoding)
 fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
